allow: Bash(grep -rn "is_a: System$\\|is_a: Findings$\\|is_a: Iam$\\|is_a: Network$\\|is_a: Discovery$\\|is_a: Application$\\|is_a: Remediation$\\|is_a: UnmannedSystems$" src/ocsf/schema/)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -c "import ocsf.datamodel.ocsf as m; print\('imported ok, classes:', sum\(1 for n in dir\(m\) if not n.startswith\('_'\)\)\)")

Bash(rm -rf src/ocsf/schema/*.yaml src/ocsf/schema/events src/ocsf/schema/profiles src/ocsf/schema/extensions && python3 -m tools.generate_ocsf_schema 2>&1 | tail -2 && python3 -c "from linkml.linter.cli import main; main\(['src/ocsf/schema/ocsf.yaml']\)" 2>&1 | tail -3)
